Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fisher Gesha]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Fisher Gesha is a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Gesha is a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Gesha has a soft heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Gesha possesses a curved goldsteel blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Gesha has a drudge with spider legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Gesha works in the foundry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Gesha is disappointed in Lindon's failure to forge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Fisher Gesha is a character who uses a goldsteel hook and has mechanical spider legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Fisher Gesha refers to Lindon as Wei Shi Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Gesha is a Fisher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Fisher Gesha has spider constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon has been under Fisher Gesha for almost two weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Fisher Gesha has spider legs where her feet should be.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Fisher Gesha refers to the scripted iron barrels as mining equipment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Fisher Gesha is a person Lindon took a pack from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Fisher Gesha is an elder who can drift on spider's legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Gesha is a Highgold Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — The spider that attacked Yerin was one of Gesha's constructs.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Fisher Gesha is a sacred artist with gray hair and eight legs of mechanical Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Gesha is a Fisher and a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Gesha is a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Fisher Gesha is a member of the Fisher sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Fisher Gesha's madra pulls objects together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Fisher Gesha uses a goldsteel-plated fishhook as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Fisher Gesha is a character Lindon stays near in the woods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Fisher Gesha is a four-foot-tall old woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Fisher Gesha has a foundry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Fisher Gesha uses a drudge to move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Gesha's voice has an extra rasp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Gesha looked at the scripts and constructs of the Thousand-Mile Cloud with Eithan and Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Fisher Gesha is a Soulsmith who tutors Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Fisher Gesha is a person who was woken by Cassias' shouts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Fisher Gesha uses dummies for practical experience.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon forged scales for Fisher Gesha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Fisher Gesha is a person who has not noticed Lindon feeding his pet Sylvan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Gesha used purple madra to pull heavy doors shut.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Fisher Gesha is a Highgold Soulsmith from the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Fisher Gesha has long purple spider legs as part of her drudge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Fisher Gesha helped prepare Lindon for the duel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Fisher Gesha has gray hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Gesha uses purple madra to manipulate objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Fisher Gesha noted that Lindon has trained like a madman for a year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Fisher Gesha is being brought by Eithan for her unique talents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Fisher Gesha has set up a camp with Remnant parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Fisher Gesha can throw a web of purple light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Fisher Gesha uses purple madra to lash lines to debris.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Fisher Gesha follows Renfei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Fisher Gesha and Lindon were assigned to an apprentice room in the foundry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Fisher Gesha uses a hook.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Fisher Gesha is a person Lindon has traveled with.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Fisher Gesha is a shrunken old woman with gray hair tied up into a bun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Fisher Gesha is a character who uses a ring to tap on the metal of a cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Gesha is a character who developed plans for a compound launcher construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Gesha noted that the Song of Falling Ash binding was nearly falling apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Fisher Gesha is a person who would advise extracting and rebuilding constructs piece by piece.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Fisher Gesha is cooking for her family and has invited the group over.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Fisher Gesha is studying Skysworn armor with Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Fisher Gesha has the strength of a Truegold and possesses purple spider-legs of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Fisher Gesha has a barn being set up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Fisher Gesha is a business owner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Fisher Gesha constructed a mobile Soulsmith foundry in the form of a barn with massive purple spider legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Fisher Gesha's mobile Soulsmith foundry roamed the Blackflame camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Gesha is a person with a wrinkled face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Gesha is a hunter of dreadbeasts in the Desolate Wilds.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon once studied old notes with Fisher Gesha.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Fisher Gesha is a Sage who offered her life to atone for her actions.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Fisher Gesha reacted poorly to being summoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Fisher Gesha has Soulsmithing facilities in tunnels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Gesha asked Seisha to work on a welcoming display for the Seven-Year Festival.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
